PowerShell($pid9222 = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 9222 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1\).OwningProcess; if \($pid9222\) { Write-Output "Matando PID $pid9222 \(Chrome do perfil .chrome-dms na porta 9222\)"; Stop-Process -Id $pid9222 -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1500; Write-Output "fechado" } else { Write-Output "nada ouvindo na 9222" })
